## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] CLI UI changes use shared theme constants.
- [ ] Runtime boundary changes are called out explicitly.
- [ ] The PR title follows the repository commit style.
